description_long: This is a white athletic shoe with a low-cut profile, featuring a prominent pink logo on the outer side and the brand name 'DIADORA' in pink on the inner side. The upper is primarily made of synthetic leather and mesh, with reinforced stitching and paneling for durability and support. The shoe has a standard criss-cross lacing system with white laces and a padded tongue for comfort. The midsole is thick and cushioned, with sculpted side vents and a visible gray accent, while the outsole is textured for traction and shows a hint of pink. The heel is slightly raised and contoured, providing additional support and stability. Overall, the shoe appears clean and in good structural condition, suitable for urban sports or casual wear.
description: White athletic shoe with pink accents, featuring a criss-cross lacing system, cushioned sole, and visible branding. The shoe is clean, well-constructed, and designed for comfort and support.
description_view_0: Side view showing the pink logo, sculpted midsole, and white laces.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the contoured heel, padded collar, and symmetrical design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the 'DIADORA' branding and gray paneling.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the toe box, lacing system, and tread pattern.
attribute_logo: Pink arrow-shaped logo on the outer side; 'DIADORA' text in pink on the inner side.
